title: carex acuta subsp. broteroana
intro: Carex acuta subsp. broteroana, also known as Sharp-leaved Sedge, is a subspecies of sedge that belongs to the Carex genus of flowering plants. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex acuta subsp. broteroana include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Carex acuta subsp. broteroana can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be administered to alleviate various health conditions.
